author: gilgamesh-tamarian
description: Converts URLs into native iframe embeds and auto-formats embeddables. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Gilgamesh in Tamarian
manifest.description: Converts URLs into native iframe embeds and auto-formats embeddables.
manifest.name: I link therefore iframe

name: I link therefore iframe

releases.author: Gilgamesh-Tamarian
releases.description: The plugin has been completely rebuilt in its architecture - links are now formatted to standard iframes instead of their custom containers. Added support for various other sites (refer to changelog).
releases.name: 2.0.0 Orion

releases.author: Gilgamesh-Tamarian
releases.description: The first release of my Auto Embed Plus plugin, in which I build upon GnoxNahte's [obsidian-auto-embed](https://github.com/GnoxNahte/obsidian-auto-embed) - which is why I keep his release numbering. This release adds support for embedding Mastodon posts. Hoping to do more in the future.
releases.name: 1.2.7 Cardassia
